name: PERFECT ROAST BEEF

ingredients.item: 475°F · There's no need to peel the vegetables -just give them a wash and roughly chop t hem. Break
pepper, r ubbing it all over the meat. Place the beef on top o f the vegetables

method: Place the roasting pan in the preheated oven. Turn the heat down immediate ly to 400°F and cook for I
hour for medium beef. If you prefer it medium-rare, take it out 5 to 10 minutes earlier. For well done,
leave it in for a nother IOta 15 minutes. If you're doing roasted potatoes and veggies, this is the time to
crack on with them (see page 202) -get them into the oven for the last 45 minutes of cooking . Baste
halfway through cooking and if the vegetables look dry, add a sp lash of water to th e pan to stop
them burning . When the beef is cooked to your liking, take the pan out of t he oven and transfer t he
beef to a board to rest for 15 minutes or so • Cover it with a layer o f aluminum foil and a kitchen towel
and put aside while you make your gravy (see page 205), horseradish sauce (see page 210), and Yorkshire
Remove th e string from the meat. Use a good, long, sharp knife to carve the meat and a fork (preferably
ing fork) to hold it steady. Serve w ith your piping hot gravy, your horseradish sauce, roasted
Your pork loin will come in one of two ways, either on or off the bone. Either way it's fi ne, but if it's on
the bone you'll have to cook it for an extra 20 minutes.You'll need a box cutter knife to score the fat (or
ask your butche r to do t his for you).
